web_warning: API keys you enter here are stored in this browser's localStorage. Any script that runs on this page can read them. Use the desktop build for stronger key isolation.
encryption_unavailable: OS keychain encryption is not available on this machine. Anthropic and OpenAI are disabled until safeStorage becomes available; Ollama (local) is unaffected.
api_key_placeholder_saved: (saved — paste a new key to replace)
ollama_tool_support_hint: Tool-call quality varies between Ollama models. If the assistant hallucinates tool calls or can't reliably read/edit files, try a model with stronger tool support — llama3.1, qwen2.5 and mistral-nemo are reliable choices.
error_model_unsupported_tools: This model doesn't support tool calls. Try a model that does (e.g. llama3.1 or qwen2.5).
